# Failures to Math Models

| Failure | Model |
|---|---|
| Small sample uncertainty | Beta-binomial |
| Delayed conversions | survival/time lag model |
| Attribution uncertainty | lift test or CausalImpact |
| Cross-channel confusion | MMM |
| Creative variants | bandit |
| Audience heterogeneity | contextual bandit/uplift |
| Fatigue | nonstationary bandit |
| Scaling | response surface/Hill saturation |
| SaaS economics | LTV/CAC/payback |
